title: thelesperma subnudum var. maliterrimum
intro: Thelesperma subnudum var. maliterrimum, also known as Maliterranean Greenthread, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Thelesperma subnudum var. maliterrimum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health and well-being.
